title: Christmas with the Chosen: Holy Night
original_title: Christmas with The Chosen: Holy Night
overview: A young mother labeled impure. A shepherd boy considered “unclean". Experience Jesus’ birth through their eyes in this blend of "The Messengers" and "The Shepherd" into one special remastered and re-scored story.
